content: Hi Riley! I saw your application for the lawn mowing job. Your profile looks great! Are you available this Saturday?
Hi Marcus! Yes, I'm available this Saturday morning. I can start around 9 AM if that works for you.
Hello! I'm interested in your deep cleaning services. Do you provide your own supplies or should I have everything ready?
Hi Sarah! I bring all my own professional-grade supplies, so you don't need to worry about anything. When would you like me to come by?
Hi Taylor! Thanks for applying. Can you tell me a bit more about your tutoring experience with 7th graders?
Of course! I've been tutoring middle school students for 3 years. I focus on building confidence and making math fun. I'd love to help your child succeed!
